name: activates per-namespace probe groups only for the namespaces the workload puts in scope
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a simple React website UI dashboard" --classify 2>c.err); echo "$OUT" | grep -q '"react"' && ! echo "$OUT" | grep -q '"k8s"' && echo frontend-scoped-not-k8s 1>&2
